data.title: Solana developers are considering increasing the network’s block capacity by 66%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News As the demand for block space grows, Solana developers are considering increasing the network's block capacity by 66%. According to a document released by core contributors this week, the new proposal SIMD-0286 proposes to increase Solana's computing unit (CU) limit per block from 60 million to 100 million.
The proposal aims to enable Solana to process more transactions and support more complex applications such as decentralized trading platforms (DEX), MEV systems, and re-staking protocols without hitting the computing limit. (Coindesk)

data.title: Ruihe Digital to Invest in Web3.0 and Cryptocurrency
data.description:
According to Odaily, Ruihe Digital Technology Holdings Limited (03680.HK) has announced that its board has approved a budget of HKD 80 million for the development of Web3.0 business and investment in cryptocurrency assets over the next two years. The company aims to align with the Hong Kong government's policies supporting the growth of the Web3.0 and cryptocurrency industries. 

Ruihe Digital plans to focus on digital asset services in the Greater China region and intends to fund these initiatives through internal resources or fundraising activities. The company believes that investing in cryptocurrency assets aligns with the global trend towards institutionalization of digital assets and will enhance its overall competitiveness.

data.title: Strategic Partnership to Advance Web3 Banking in the U.S.
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, World Liberty Financial (WLFI) and Vaulta have announced a strategic partnership aimed at accelerating the adoption of Web3 banking in the United States. This collaboration will integrate Vaulta's native assets into WLFI's macro strategy reserves and incorporate WLFI's stablecoin USD1 into Vaulta's Web3 banking solutions, facilitating easier management, growth, and protection of assets within a decentralized ecosystem.

Inspired by U.S. President Donald Trump's vision of empowering the American economy, World Liberty Financial is committed to promoting a decentralized financial model to enhance access to advanced financial tools. Vaulta, on the other hand, focuses on compliance, institutional collaboration, and scalable technology, establishing itself as a leading force in the Web3 banking sector.

Zak Folkman, co-founder of World Liberty Financial, stated, "USD1 is rapidly becoming the preferred stablecoin for institutional and real-world payment channels, and this partnership with Vaulta marks another significant step forward. WLFI and Vaulta share a common vision: to build a bridge between traditional finance and DeFi. By integrating USD1 into Vaulta's Web3 banking infrastructure, we are making decentralized finance more practical, compliant, and accessible to both ordinary and institutional users."

Yves La Rose, founder and CEO of Vaulta Foundation, commented, "Partnering with World Liberty Financial is a crucial milestone in Vaulta's journey to redefine the future of Web3 banking. Both Vaulta and WLFI believe that a more open and transparent financial system must rely on the on-chain transformation of real assets and seamless payment capabilities. This collaboration brings us closer to achieving this shared goal."

Through this partnership, WLFI and Vaulta aim to enhance market liquidity, expand on-chain access to real assets, and further bridge the gap between traditional finance and decentralized platforms. This strategic alliance demonstrates both parties' commitment to the widespread adoption of stablecoins, DeFi, and Web3 banking, with the goal of creating a more inclusive, innovative, and accessible financial future.

Vaulta is a high-performance banking operating system offering developers and enterprise users exceptional speed, reliability, and flexibility. As a gateway to the Bitcoin ecosystem and a leader in decentralized data management, Vaulta is reshaping financial infrastructure through solutions like Vaulta EVM and exSat, supporting instant finality, cross-chain communication, and industry-leading low transaction costs. Vaulta's vision is to drive the emergence of the next-generation financial system, paving the way for the future of Web3 banking.

World Liberty Financial (WLFI) is a cutting-edge decentralized financial protocol and governance platform inspired by President Trump's advocacy. WLFI is dedicated to developing transparent, secure, and accessible financial tools, including institutional-grade products aimed at expanding participation in decentralized finance. WLFI's stablecoin USD1 is exchangeable 1:1 with the U.S. dollar, fully backed by short-term U.S. Treasury bonds, cash, and equivalents.

data.title: deBridge Foundation launches reserve fund to repurchase DBR tokens with all protocol revenue
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The deBridge Foundation has launched a reserve fund that will use 100% of the protocol revenue to repurchase its native DBR tokens on the open market. As of July 24, the fund has acquired 1.3% of the total supply of DBR since its launch in June, worth nearly $3 million. The deBridge overall treasury now holds $30.1 million in assets, covering DBR, USDC, SOL and ETH. In addition, the fund is also exploring income strategies and has launched a public dashboard to track assets and income in real time. (The Block)

data.title: Tesla Scores $284M Unrealized Gain Thanks to Bitcoin Resurgence
data.description:
TL;DR Tesla booked a $284M paper profit on Bitcoin thanks to a 60% BTC price surge in Q2 2025 and new accounting rules allowing “fair value” reporting of crypto holdings. The EV maker’s strategic hold of 9,720 BTC is now valued at $1. 2B, showcasing gains from its initial 2021 investment despite selling 75% during a 2022 market downturn. . . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/tesla-scores-284m-unrealized-gain-thanks-to-bitcoin-resurgence/

data.title: Everything Blockchain: Advancing the construction of the Meme Coin Treasury and launching the MemeStrategy S-1 registration
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Everything Blockchain, a US listed company, announced that the MemeStrategy spin-off has entered the next stage. The company officially launched the US Securities and Exchange Commission S-1 registration process for MemeStrategy, aiming to prepare for subsequent listing on Nasdaq through financing or strategic acquisitions. In addition, MemeStrategy will also advance its Meme coin acquisition strategy, including PEPE, BONK and SPX6900, to build the first Meme coin treasury of a US-listed company. (Globe newswire)
Previously, Everything Blockchain also announced plans to invest $10 million in Solana (SOL), XRP, Sui (SUI), Bittensor (TAO) and Hyperliquid (HYPE) to create a multi-token pledge vault for institutional adoption trends.

data.title: “A whale who held nearly 4,000 BTC in hibernation for 14.5 years” transferred all BTC to a new wallet
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Arkham data shows that the "dormant whale holding nearly 4,000 BTC for 14.5 years" has just transferred all of its 3,962.62 BTC (about $469 million) to a new wallet address (bc1qczar85zjppfjr8df8qnc4l3h5r957v6p2udryz)

data.title: XT Exchange launches CTA (Cross The Ages)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News XT launched CTA (Cross The Ages) and opened CTA/USDT trading pairs in the Innovation Zone (GameFi). Details are as follows:
Recharge time: 17:00 on July 23, 2025 (UTC+8)
Trading time: 17:00 on July 24, 2025 (UTC+8)
Withdrawal time: 17:00 on July 25, 2025 (UTC+8)
Cross The Ages (CTA) is a comprehensive intellectual property (IP) covering a variety of media and entertainment forms. It aims to attract players through a rich experience that integrates the Web2 and Web3 ecosystems. CTA's product line includes: video games, books, movies/series, collectible models, peripheral products, and derivative products.

data.title: Ethereum PoS Network Faces Significant Queue Delays
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from validatorqueue indicates that approximately 653,000 ETH, valued at around $2.38 billion at current prices, are queued to exit the Ethereum Proof-of-Stake (PoS) network. The estimated waiting time for these withdrawals is about 11 days and 8 hours. Concurrently, over 312,000 ETH, worth approximately $1.14 billion, are in line to join the network, with an expected activation delay of around 5 days and 10 hours.
